title: Senior Software Engineer - Sonata Software - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Sonata Software - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Sonata Software, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sonata Software:
Sonata Software is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sonata Software!
